calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-15-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Michael Raifsnider Clerk: V.Mack CSR: JoAnn Bryce
This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Joseph Sacramento, Esq., with Bernard Stalder, property manager, for Plaintiff.
Defendant Aaron Williams present in pro per.
Parties reached a settlement for Entry of Judgment or for Dismissal of the action With Prejudice.
Terms of the ORAL settlement were read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendant for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at: 1115 Taylor Street, San Francisco. Stayed of execution as long as the Defendant pays the January thru April 2004 back rent of $3,371.50 and current rents in monthly installments as follows: On May 3, 2004 $1,500.00; May 21, 2004 $807.00; June 7, 2004 $1,435.50; July 7, 2004 $1,435.50; August 13, 2004 $1,435.50 and September 10, 2004 $935.00. If Defendant complies with the terms, Plaintiff to dismiss with prejudice. If the Defendant fails to comply with the terms, Plaintiff shall upon Ex Parte Application and declaration to the Court, with at 24 hours notice to the Defendant, obtain a Judgment for immediate restitution and possession of the premises and all monies owing. Forfeiture of the rental agreement if monies not paid. Defendant warrants that no one else occupying the premises who claims a right to possession, waives any right to make a motion to set aside or vacate the judgment, or to apply for a stay or relief from forfeiture, any items left in the premises shall be deemed abandoned. Each party waives claim against the other.
Plaintiff shall have right to inspect the premises within 10 days of this settlement. Each side shall bear their own fees and costs. Plaintiff's counsel shall prepare judgment; Defendant has 7 days upon receipt to sign and return same. All parties agreed to the settlement in open court. The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
